---
title: "Full Presentation Title"
subtitle: "Full Presentation Subtitle"
author: "Robert Speedwagon"
institute: "Faculty of Social Studies, Masaryk University"
date: today
format: muni-fss-revealjs
# Optional: override what appears in the footer
# footer-author: "R. Speedwagon"
# footer-title: "Short Presentation Title"
---

## Plain Text & Emphasis

Plain text, **bold emphasis**, *italic*, and `inline code`.

Structure color applied to [links](https://www.muni.cz).

## Bullet Lists

- A single-line bullet list item
- A bullet list item that is quite long, forcing a line break, which also contains **emphasized text**
  - A second-level list item
    - A third-level list item
  - **An emphasized second-level list item**

## Numbered Lists

1. A numbered list item
2. A second item containing a math expression

$$E = mc^2$$

## Code Block

```r
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = wt, y = mpg)) +
  geom_point(color = "#007A53") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Table

| First Name | Surname  | Field          |
|------------|----------|----------------|
| Albert     | Einstein | Physics        |
| Marie      | Curie    | Chemistry      |
| Thomas     | Edison   | Engineering    |

: The great minds of the 19th century

## Blockquote & Callout

> The function of education is to teach one to think intensively and to think critically.

::: {.callout-note}
This is a **note** callout block.
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
This is a **warning** callout block.
:::

## Two Columns

:::: {.cols-2}
::: {}
**Left column**

- Point one
- Point two
- Point three
:::
::: {}
**Right column**

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
:::
::::

## Gray Background Slide {.slide-gray}

This slide uses the `.slide-gray` class for a light gray background.

Useful for transitional or summary slides.

## Thank You {.outro}
